title: Goderich Beachside Rapid
location: Knights of Columbus – Main Hall, 390 Parsons Court, Goderich, ON
description:
**Time Control**: 15 minutes + 10 seconds increment per move. CFC Rated (quick time control).

 **Round Schedule**: 
 Round 1: 10:00 AM 
 Round 2: 11:00 AM 
 Round 3: 1:00 PM 
 Round 4: 2:00 PM 
 Round 5: 3:00 PM 

 **Forfeit Time**: 5 minutes 
 **Sections**: Open and U1700 
 **Registration**: Please send your $20 entry fee e-transfer to goderichchessclub@gmail.com. Once that's completed, please fill out the register / inquire form. Registration will close on September 4th, 2026 at 9:00 PM. 
 
 To obtain a CFC membership, please use the Join the CFC button below. For membership fees please use the CFC Membership - Fees button below. 

 **Tournament Director, Organizer & Arbiter**: FIDE Arbiter Riley Khan 

 Pairings and live results will be available on chess-results.com. Please note that the registration list does not auto-update once you’ve submitted your registration form. 
 Rating sections and round times are subject to change without notice. What you see on this page is the most current date, rating sections, and round times. 
 Unrated players will receive a provisional rating regardless of if they play rated players or not. 
 This tournament will be an over the board (not online) tournament. 

 Parents are welcome to drop off their children and leave, though they are encouraged to stay and enjoy the chess tournament/event. There will a waiting area for parents and for lunch / analysis. 

 **Volunteer hours** 
 Students that would like to volunteer can email goderichchessclub@gmail.com to connect with the tournament director to obtain volunteer hours towards the 40 hours required to graduate with a high school diploma. 

 **Photography Notice** 
 Please note that photos and videos may be taken during this tournament for club records, website, and social media use. By attending or participating, you consent to the use of your image, or your child’s image, for these purposes. Feel free to email us at goderichchessclub@gmail.com if you have any questions. 

 **Our Sponsors** 
 We would like to thank our sponsors: 

 – Noah Krantz from Rostra Marine 
 – Levi Taylor from Shoreline Welding 
 – Paul McInnis from Jokey 

 For any questions feel free to email us at goderichchessclub@gmail.com

title: Goderich Gambit
location: Goderich Library, 52 Montreal St, Goderich, ON
description: Our first official CFC rated tournament. One open section, with a strong turnout from across Huron County.
